title.en: The Lord of the Blood God Temple smiled coldly.

content.en:
Then, a terrifying aura came out of the Blood God Temple. It was the Lord of the Blood God Temple. He looked directly at Ye Tian in the void.

"You are only in the 35th Heaven, and you dare to break into my Blood God Temple?"

The Lord of the Blood God Temple smiled coldly.

In the past, it was not that there had not been strong men who attacked the Blood God Temple, but the result was death.

"Kill him!"

The Lord of the Blood God Temple ordered.

He did not need to do it himself, he only needed the high-level people of the Blood God Temple to do it, and they could surround and kill Ye Tian.

In an instant, dozens of blood-colored lights blocked the void, and they all sacrificed the treasures of the heavy palace to kill Ye Tian.

The murderous intent formed by these many treasures of the heavy palace blocked the void, making it difficult to escape.

If it were any other cultivator of the 35th Heaven, he would definitely face a dead end at this moment and could not escape.

But at this moment, he was very calm.

"Break!"

Ye Tian used the Extreme Blood Blade and slashed it out, shattering the layers of void and knocking away the treasures of the palace one by one. The terrifying attack shattered the bodies of the powerful and killed them.

"Not good!"

The face of the Blood God Temple Master changed drastically. He underestimated Ye Tian's strength. This 177 strength was even more terrifying than him!

Ye Tian's Extreme Blood Escape was too fast. With the Extreme Blood Blade, he instantly killed the powerful people of the Blood God Temple. When the Blood God Temple Master opened the formation, most of the high-level people were killed.

"You are looking for death!"

The Blood God Temple Master was extremely angry. He suppressed Ye Tian with the formation and activated the Blood God Tower of the Blood God Temple.

Boom! ! ! ! ! !

The Blood God Tower suppressed down, carrying supreme pressure. This is the most powerful treasure of the Blood God Temple. With the Blood God Tower and the formation, it is enough to increase the strength of the Blood God Temple Master by several times.

"Kill!"

The Blood God Temple Master went all out to kill Ye Tian.

Ye Tian did not dare to underestimate the Blood God Temple Master and exerted the power of the Extreme Blood Blade to the extreme. The increase brought by the Ultimate Palace made his combat power extremely terrifying.

Soon, the Blood God Temple Master could not bear it.

"Damn it, the opponent's ultimate palace is too terrifying, the magic power is so pure and powerful, it is more terrifying than other monsters that I have seen who have condensed the ultimate palace!!!"

The Lord of the Blood God Temple naturally didn't know that Ye Tian's ultimate palace was the ultimate palace that best suited him. It was created by himself, so he could naturally exert all his strength. Moreover, his self-created extreme blood blade, extreme blood armor, and extreme blood escape were all extremely terrifying. They belonged to the top ultimate palace secrets. Under the combination, his combat power was naturally extremely terrifying.

Crack! ! ! !

The Blood God Tower cracked, and many of the Blood God Temple's formations had been broken, and they couldn't stop Ye Tian at all.

"Sir, when did our Blood God Temple offend you?"

The Lord of the Blood God Temple asked.

However, Ye Tian didn't answer at all and continued to attack.

Gradually, the Lord of the Blood God Temple couldn't hold on., even with the protection of the Blood God Tower, the remaining damage repeatedly hit his body.

The body tempered by the Ultimate Palace far surpassed the body tempered by the Supreme Palace. In terms of the strength of the body, Ye Tian beat the Blood God Temple Master.

Sudden.

The Blood God Temple Master blew up countless formations of the Blood God Temple, and the terrifying fluctuations completely shattered this piece of void.

Even the Blood God Tower was sacrificed by the Blood God Temple Master. The terrifying fluctuations suppressed Ye Tian, ​​giving the Blood God Temple Master a chance to escape.

Swish!

He fled quickly, not caring about the Blood God Temple at all. As long as he was alive, he could rebuild the Blood God Temple in the future. If he fell here, the Blood God Temple would be truly completely destroyed.

"Want to leave?"

Ye Tian sneered. He came to kill the Blood God Temple just to seize the Mist Order. If the Blood God Temple Master escaped, how could he get the Mist Order?

So, he had been on guard against the Blood God Temple Master's escape.

Immediately, he risked being injured in the flesh, broke through the broken time and space with the Extreme Blood Escape, and chased after the Blood God Temple Master.

The Blood God Temple Master delayed too short a time, and was soon caught up by Ye Tian.

"Die!"

Ye Tian's Extreme Blood Blade slashed through the Blood God Temple Master's body, seriously injuring him.

Again and again, the attacks passed through the Blood God Temple Master's flesh, and after a while, the Blood God Temple Master completely fell and died.

Wow!

He reached out and grabbed a token from the Blood God Temple Master. After confirming that it was the Mist Token, he quickly left and disappeared.

Soon after, many powerful people came here and saw the fallen Blood God Temple Master, and they were all shocked.

"The Blood God Temple Master is dead!"

"Who killed him?"

"I don't know. It was a strange thirty-fifth heaven cultivator. He should be practicing the Ultimate Chonggong Gong method and created the Ultimate Chonggong secret method. He should be from the top power in the Mist Region, otherwise he wouldn't be so evil."

"Did the Blood God Temple kill a member of a big power and get revenge?"

"The Blood God Temple Master is also a thirty-sixth heaven existence. In the future, he may have the hope of impacting the Ultimate Palace Master. What a pity! ”

“So, the Blood God Temple is too arrogant, attacking and killing various forces. Now it has offended people. Otherwise, it would not have ended up like this!”

“The Blood God Temple’s master is dead, and the top leaders are almost dead. The forces that the Blood God Temple has offended will probably besiege the Blood God Temple, and the Blood God Temple will definitely be destroyed!”

“Let’s go and plunder the Blood God Temple’s resources. If it’s too late, there will be nothing to get!”

Soon, the strong men of many forces surrounded and killed the Blood God Temple. The members of the Blood God Temple were almost slaughtered, and such a large force was destroyed.

……

“The Blood God Temple’s master was killed. The cultivator of the 35th Heaven, could it be that senior?” Ghost Old guessed that it was Ye Tian who did it, mainly because it was too coincidental.

If notIt was Ye Tian, ​​he couldn't think of who it was.

The main reason was that he had just given Ye Tian information about the list of Wu Ling, and then the Blood God Temple master who held the Wu Ling died.

"With the strength of that senior, maybe he really has a chance to join the Wu Pavilion!"

Ghost said secretly.

Once he joins the Wu Pavilion, Ye Tian will really rise!

...

"This is the Wu Ling, refine it first!"

Ye Tian began to refine the Wu Ling. After a while, he completely refined the Wu Ling, and there were still three opportunities to use this Wu Ling.

Immediately, he activated the Wu Ling.

Suddenly, his body was covered by a cloud of gray fog and was teleported into the Wu Tower.

Soon.

The Wu Tower is here!

He came to the first floor of the Wu Tower.

According to the requirements of the Fog Pavilion, only those who have passed the sixth floor of the Fog Tower can hope to join the Fog Pavilion, and the difficulty of the Fog Tower varies according to different cultivation levels.

Ye Tian is at the 35th level of cultivation, so the requirement for him is naturally the 35th level, which is slightly less difficult than the 36th level.

Therefore, it is easier for Ye Tian to pass the level. .
